content.intro: Offers V2 is the new RRA 2025 compliant offers platform, replacing V1 for all new offer activity. All new offers must be sent through V2 to ensure compliance with the Renters Rights Act.

sections.title: What is Offers V2?
sections.content: Offers V2 is a fully rebuilt offer management platform designed to meet the requirements of the Renters Rights Act 2025. It is completely separate from V1 (Legacy). Key features include max rent enforcement, discrimination-compliant wording requirements, a landlord approval workflow, multi-select accept/decline for bulk applicant management, and one-click Reposit and Unithomes deposit replacement options.

sections.title: Max Rent Enforcement
sections.content: When sending an offer, you set the Advertised Rent. This acts as a ceiling — tenants can submit offers at or below this figure but cannot offer more than the advertised rent. This prevents agents inadvertently accepting above-asking bids and ensures compliance with RRA rent transparency requirements.

sections.title: Discrimination-Compliant Wording
sections.content: The RRA 2025 bans discriminatory lettings restrictions such as 'No DSS', 'No pets', or 'No children' in property notes and offer communications. Offers V2 is designed with this in mind — do not include any such language in property notes or offer messages. Violations may expose your agency to legal liability.

sections.title: Landlord Approval Workflow
sections.content: Offers V2 includes a built-in landlord approval step. Once a tenant submits an offer, you can send it to the landlord for sign-off before proceeding to referencing. Landlords receive a formatted email with the tenant's details and offered rent and can approve directly.

sections.title: V1 Legacy Offers
sections.content: All offers and references started in V1 remain visible under Legacy References in the sidebar. These will continue to process normally through to completion. Do not attempt to move V1 references into V2 — they are separate systems. Only new offers should go through V2.

sections.title: Use V2 for All New Offers
sections.content: From the RRA 2025 compliance date, all new offers must go through Offers V2. Legacy V1 is retained only for in-flight references that were already started. Starting new offers in V1 is not compliant.
